content_body:
After searching for a vacation that didn't involve "The Mouse," I stumbled across Cabin Rentals of Georgia. Although only three nights, it has been the best vacation we have had in a long time. Our best friends met us here and it was the best experience for us and our children. Next time, we need more than three days! Everything was first-rate that we encountered, but that just may have been the accommodations since we really went nowhere. What we did experience was lovely!

The Acevedos & Johnsons
title: First-Rate
